name: Cheese Bread- 1/12/96
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. On a lightly floured surface, unroll the tube of bread dough and pat out to a rectangle about 12" x 14".
3. Sprinkle the shredded Mozzarella cheese evenly over the dough.
4. Top with the sliced salami.
5. Place the chopped roasted peppers over the salami.
6. Roll the dough up tightly, starting with the short side.
7. Pinch the edges together to seal and place seam-side down in an ungreased baking dish.
8. Brush the top of the roll with the melted butter and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes before cutting.
11. To serve, cut into 1-inch slices using a serrated knife.
Yield: 1 loaf
